chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-1010 of 2026 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For order on Misc. No.7284/2026 2. For order on office objection 3. For order on Misc. No.4179/2026 4. For hearing of Misc. No.4180/2026 5. For hearing of main case 08.4.2026 Mr. Ali Nawaz Khuhawar advocate for the interveners --------------------- M/s Kashif Hanif, Sarmad Ali and Waqar Ahmed advocates file Vakalatnama on behalf of the petitioners, which is taken on record. Learned counsel for the petitioners under instructions does not press this petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed alongwith listed / pending applications. JUDGE JUDGE Zahid/*
